info.title: NSSharp - Objective-C Header Parser & C# Binding Generator
info.description: A .NET CLI tool that parses Objective-C headers and generates C# binding definitions (Xamarin.iOS / .NET for iOS style) or structured JSON output. No libclang required.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Invoke-prefix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineConfiguration.Parse, OK: CommandLineConfiguration.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineConfiguration.Invoke, OK: CommandLineConfiguration.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: CommandLineConfiguration.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandLineConfiguration.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: NSSharp — Objective-C header parser and C# binding generator

options.name: --xcframework
options.description: Path to an .xcframework bundle to discover and parse all headers.

options.name: --slice
options.description: Select a specific xcframework slice (e.g. ios-arm64). Use --list-slices to see available slices.

options.name: --list-slices
options.description: List available slices in the xcframework and exit.

options.name: --output
options.description: Write output to a file instead of stdout (or a directory when --split-by-header is used).

options.name: --compact
options.description: Output compact JSON instead of pretty-printed.

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format: csharp (default) or json. [default: csharp]

options.name: --extern-macros
options.description: Macro names to treat as extern (e.g. --extern-macros PSPDF_EXPORT MY_EXPORT). [default: System.String[]]

options.name: --no-macro-heuristic
options.description: Disable automatic UPPER_SNAKE_CASE macro detection. By default, identifiers like NS_SWIFT_NAME or VENDOR_DEPRECATED are auto-skipped.

options.name: --emit-c-bindings
options.description: Include C function declarations ([DllImport]) in C# binding output. Extern constants ([Field]) are always included.

options.name: --split-by-header
options.description: For C# format, write one .cs file per input header (requires --output directory).

options.name: --namespace
options.description: Namespace for generated C# output. Defaults to xcframework name when --xcframework is used.

arguments.name: files
arguments.description: One or more Objective-C header files to parse.
